title: Export from package is not supported
body:
When I tried to compile this little code snippet from the standard (p. 746, 26.6, first example, first lines) I get a syntax error. Effectively, importing into a module seems to be unsupported.
So my question is: Is this actually supported?
```
package p1;
	int x, y;
endpackage 

package p2;
	import p1::x;
	export p1::*;
endpackage 
```
Command Line:
```
$ iverilog -g2012 imports.sv
imports.sv:6: syntax error
I give up.
```
code_blocks:
$ iverilog -g2012 imports.sv
imports.sv:6: syntax error
I give up.
